Description:
Model
Brand: ASUS
Name: XA12 ROG STRIX SCOPE II RX/RXRD/CA/ABS
Model: ROG Strix Scope II RX Gaming Keyboard
Part Number: 90MP0350-BKAA00


Keyboard
Keyboard Interface Keyboard Interface: USB 2.0 (TypeC to TypeA)
Design Style: Standard
Layout: Full-size
Palm Rest: Detachable
Mechanical Keyboard Mechanical Keyboard: Yes
Key Switch Key Switch: ROG RX Red
Key Switch Type: Linear
Keycaps: PBT doubleshot
Keyboard Color: Black
Backlit: Per-Key RGB LEDs
Dimensions: Keyboard: 43.6 x 12.9 x 3.6 cm
Wrist rest: 43.6 x 8.2 x 2.0 cm
Type Type: Optical


Mouse
Mouse Included: No


OS / System Requirement
Operating System Supported: Windows® 11


Features
Features: ROG RX optical switches: Pre-lubed RX switches feature centralized lighting and provide consistent wobble-free keystrokes with near-zero debounce delay.
IP57-rated: Waterproof and dust resistant for long-lasting durability.
Hotkeys: F1–F5 keys are pre-programmed as hotkeys for Xbox Game Bar and recording.
Intuitive controls: Multifunction button and three-way knob for media playback, volume, and keyboard lighting.
Sound-dampening foam: Integrated foam absorbs pinging noises and echoes for improved acoustics.
ABS keycaps: Soft matte-like UV-coated ABS keycaps for a clean, refined feel.
Unique ROG-themed space bar: UV-coated spacebar with special ROG markings and three underside RGB LEDs.
Ergonomic design: Three tilt positions and a detachable wrist rest.


Package Contents
Package Contents: 1 x ROG Strix Scope II RX
1 x Wrist rest
1 x ROG-themed spacebar keycap
1 x USB cable
1 x ROG sticker
1 x quick start guide
1 x warranty booklet
Label: Teclado Asus ROG Strix Scope II 96 RX Red Black
